relationships: ber:Lezzayer Tamaneɣt tesri tinedda aydeg yezmer ad yeddu yiwen
ber:Lezzayer Tamaneɣt teḥwaj tinedda aydeg yezmer ad yeddu yiwen
ber:Sami iga laman deg waṭas n yimdanen aydeg ur yelli ara yessefk laman

ber:Imir-a, Lezzayer d tamurt aydeg yella laman
ber:Sami d amdan aydeg tzemremt ad tgemt laman
ber:Sami yesɛedda yiwet n tallit aydeg ay as-d-yusa yewɛeṛ ad yaɣ tanumi
ber:Sami d amdan aydeg tzemremt ad tgemt taflest
ber:Sami d amdan aydeg tzemred ad tged laman
ber:Lezzayer tesri tinedda aydeg yezmer ad yeddu yiwen
ber:Aṭas n tikkal aydeg tuggza tezmer ad tefru taluft s wammak d aɣudan
ber:Sami d amdan aydeg tzemrem ad tgem laman
ber:Sami d amdan aydeg tzemred ad tged taflest
ber:Imir-a, Lezzayer d tamurt aydeg tella tɣellsit
